examples: Even so, there is just one flaw in all these hymns of praise, for the homage to languages unique accomplishment conceals a simple yet critical incongruity.
She smiled at the incongruity of the question.
She was struck by the incongruity of the situation.
When squatters move in, they bring a new life to the space, often surprising in its incongruity.
If Piaguaje was struck by the incongruity of his surroundings, he did not let on.
